title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.490 - Subpoenas to witnesses
text:
492.490.  Subpoenas to witnesses. — The officer named in the commission may issue a subpoena to such witnesses, requiring them to appear and testify at a time and place therein named, and may enforce obedience thereto by attachment.
(RSMo 1939 § 1960) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1796; 1919 § 5483; 1909 § 6426
